_comment: OpenClaw configuration template for fresh PixelPort tenants. Matches buildOpenClawConfig() in api/inngest/functions/provision-tenant.ts; the workspace contract itself is generated separately into workspace-main plus pixelport/.
_note: Gemini-backed web search is emitted only when GEMINI_API_KEY exists in the deploy environment.

acp._comment: Disable ACP dispatch for fresh-tenant canaries unless a release-specific validation pass explicitly approves enabling it.

hooks._comment: Runtime uses buildBootstrapHooksConfig() to derive a separate hook token from the gateway token.
